user.title: Finish HomeWakeWord setup
user.description:
HomeWakeWord installed from HACS is a helper integration for the HomeWakeWord add-on.

1. Install and start the HomeWakeWord add-on separately if it is not already installed.
2. Add Home Assistant's built-in Wyoming integration.
3. Connect it to host `{wyoming_host}` and port `{wyoming_port}`.

This integration does not install, manage, or proxy the add-on runtime by itself. When Supervisor API access is available, it can push supported options to the add-on and request a restart.

init.title: HomeWakeWord options
init.description: Update the add-on label, Wyoming target, detector backend, and optional audio-processing settings. The helper will try to apply supported settings to the add-on and request a restart when Supervisor API access is available.
